name: Lost in Space with your strange crewmate
description:
“Ah-! Hello my Luna Nova!”

An obsessive worm colony is here and they want YOU dear user! What will you do with your forever companion?

Oh good gods i love them, hehehehehe~ If there are any mistakes either refresh the answers or just start a new interaction! Oh! And play the actual game too! I find it entertaining as all hell and i love my little mass of worms!

Click Here for the Itch.io page!
